creator: mmokhi@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 173340
Patch to add missing entries to plist and missing dependency to Makefile

Thanks for points that you stated.
Currently the port has sanity-check problem in poudriere too (if you enable any of CLANG options it will have orphaned bin/codelite-lldb and lib/codelite/LLDBDebugger.so)
Also the point that w.schwarzenfeld told is valid point.

It seems fixed for me using this patch.
Matthias, Would you please check if this fixes the problem you encountered with synth too (in both cases of using CLANG completion and not using it)?
